label: Agentic Orchestrator
description: Full system prompt + tool schemas + entire conversation history re-sent on every turn. Output is a short JSON action or brief reply.
rationale: Soul/system prompt alone is often 50–100k tokens. Add tool schemas, memory, conversation history and you hit 200–300k input easily. The model just outputs a short tool call or decision.

label: Workflow Automation
description: Structured system prompts with data payloads in. Short structured JSON or text responses out.
rationale: Data payloads and task instructions dominate. Output is almost always a short structured response.

label: Coding Assistant
description: Large file context and codebase snippets in. Full function implementations or refactors out.
rationale: File context is large but so is generated code. Roughly balanced.

label: Long-form Generation
description: Short creative brief or prompt in. Full scripts, scenes, voiceover, ad copy out.
rationale: The brief is tiny. The generated content is the expensive part.

label: Chat Assistant
description: Conversational turns with growing history. Medium-length responses.
rationale: History accumulates on input side but responses are moderate length.

label: RAG / Doc Q&A
description: Massive retrieved document chunks stuffed into context. Short factual answers out.
rationale: The entire retrieval corpus goes in. The answer is a paragraph.

label: Code Review / Analysis
description: Full file diffs or entire PRs as input. Short inline comments and summaries out.
rationale: Diffs are large. Review comments are short.

label: Voice / Realtime
description: Short user speech turns in. Verbose, speech-friendly responses out — full sentences, no lists.
rationale: Speech input is brief. Model must generate full natural sentences for TTS.

label: Custom
description: Set your own input/output token ratio using the sliders.
